response.justification: While the candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and strong software engineering fundamentals, there is a significant gap in the primary technical requirement. Modern C++ is the core skill needed, yet the candidate's last hands-on C++ work was in 2014-2015—over a decade ago. Current focus is TypeScript/JavaScript. For a mid-senior individual contributor role requiring immediate productivity, this is a substantial ramp-up concern. Additionally, no production routing or navigation systems experience is evident.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain expertise as GISCollective founder and mapping application developer
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture with strong TDD, testing, and quality assurance background
Versatile full-stack engineer who learns new technologies quickly and selects tools pragmatically
concerns: Modern C++ experience is 10+ years outdated; last hands-on C++ work was 2014-2015, with recent focus on TypeScript/JavaScript
No production experience with routing systems, navigation optimization, or related pipeline work
Geospatial experience is in mapping/data collection (GISCollective) rather than routing tile generation or navigation data pipelines
